data.body: PASS 1 — T1 (Prior-art / novel-architecture justification): PASS. The plan explicitly reuses established in-codebase patterns rather than inventing new architecture: the reducer-ignored sidecar mirrors the SYNC/PRECONDITIONS precedent (_NON_REPLAY_KNOWN_TYPES in reducer/_version.py:44), retention reuses "rebar's existing event compaction", and rollout follows the documented "preserved-and-ignored-by-older-clones" forward-compat pattern (reducer/_version.py:8-19, CLAUDE.md:301). No bright-line novel pattern fires; no unverified capability assertions.
